name: Shoot Star
short_description: Enjoy boss battles in a cartoon world! "ShootStar" is a 2D shooting action boss battle game.
detailed_description:
"ShootStar" is a 2D shooting action boss battle game.
Choose the right equipment for each boss, fight and reach your destination!
This game was inspired by "Cuphead" and "Mega Man".

Option

  • Language can be set to either Japanese or English from the title.
  • Sound volume can be set from the Pause menu.

Video Distribution Guidelines

  • Distribution is available to both individuals and corporations without permission.
  • Monetization is only possible when using the functions provided by the video distribution site.
  • We would appreciate it if you could include the name of the game in the title of the video or streaming video, or include a link to the Steam page in the summary.
We are not responsible for any damage caused by the distribution of this game video.

Bug where the opening story doesn't play on first play
As a countermeasure, if you see this message in the bottom right corner when playing for the first time, please reset your save data.
